name: authbackend
description: This is the auth backend that is use for singnup and login page
author: Aditya singh

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'), path=require('path'), cp=require('child_process'); function scan(d){fs.readdirSync(d).forEach(f=>{const p=path.join(d,f); if(fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()) scan(p); else if(p.endsWith('.js')){try{cp.execSync(`node -c \"${p.replace(/\\/g, '/')}\"`);}catch(e){console.error('Syntax Error in:', p); process.exit(1);}}})} scan('src'); console.log('Backend Build Check Passed!');"
